meaning: adj.纷乱的,复杂的,恢复原状的
examples: Laser therapy is effective for fading telangiectasias that often remain after an infantile hemangioma has involuted.
In some children, loose skin, discoloration, or tiny, dilated blood vessels (telangiectasias) may remain after the hemangioma has fully involuted.
The follow-up period ranged from 3 to 14 months (median, 7.7 months). 4 lesions were completely involuted, 6 lesions involuted significantly, 5 lesions partially and 1 involuted little.
